programme.title: Estado Paranormal
programme.desc: Ryan leva sua equipe para Point Pleasant, na Virgínia Ocidental, a fim de investigar algo que desafia seus conhecimentos paranormais: o misterioso homem-mariposa.

programme.title: Estado Paranormal
programme.desc: Ryan e sua equipe investigam a bizarra assombração de uma mulher e seu cachorro na isolada Waterboro, em Maine.

programme.title: Estado Paranormal
programme.desc: Siga a dramática vida de Ryan Buell e outros estudantes da Universidade de Penn State, membros da Sociedade de Pesquisas Paranormais (PRS), a primeira sancionada por uma universidade, enquanto buscam a verdade por trás de terríveis mistérios da vida real.

programme.title: Estado Paranormal
programme.desc: A PRS visita um casal do oeste da Pensilvânia que está sendo atormentado por uma chuva de atividades paranormais. Objetos religiosos são destruídos, televisões, luzes e ventiladores misteriosamente ligam sozinhos.

programme.title: Estado Paranormal

programme.title: Estado Paranormal
programme.desc: Sarah acha que sua casa em Parkville, em Maryland, foi invadida por uma força poderosa desde que seu colega Dennis se mudou para lá.

programme.title: Estado Paranormal
programme.desc: Desde que Wes e sua família se mudaram para a nova casa em York, na Pensilvânia, eles estão tendo que lidar com uma força sombria que faz cada dia ser um inferno.

programme.title: Estado Paranormal

programme.title: Estado Paranormal

programme.desc: Janeway se encuentra atrapada en un misterioso bucle temporal, en el que siempre acaba muriendo.

programme.title: Star Trek Voyager: Fiebre en la sangre
programme.desc: Un ritual de apareamiento vulcano enfrenta a Torres con un compañero de tripulación, mientras Chakotay descubre algo sorprendente sobre los invasores de un planeta extraño.

programme.desc: Cuando el Doctor añade una mezcla de nuevas subrutinas a su programación, se vuelve violento.

programme.desc: La tripulación intenta ayudar a los habitantes de un planeta que sufre el bombardeo de asteroides letales.

programme.desc: Kim cree que es originario de Taresia, un planeta habitado principalmente por mujeres.

programme.title: Star Trek Voyager: Antes y después
programme.desc: Kes, en su lecho de muerte, empieza a revivir su vida retrocediendo en el tiempo.

programme.desc: Mientras Paris emprende un arriesgado vuelo hacia una tormenta de energía subespacial, el Doctor descubre lo que es la vida familiar.

programme.title: Star Trek Voyager: El guardián (parte 1 & 2)
programme.desc: Mientras buscan a un oficial desaparecido, la capitana Kathryn Janeway y la tripulación de la Voyager se ven arrastradas a 70 000 años luz de casa.

programme.title: Delitti a circuito chiuso
programme.desc: Shirley Shell è una moglie amorevole, madre devota di tre figli e nonna amorevole di due nipoti. Nel 2007, Shirley viene trovata brutalmente assassinata nella sua casa di Edmond, Okla.

programme.title: Delitti a circuito chiuso
programme.desc: Christina Morris, 23 anni, scompare mentre è fuori con gli amici a Plano, in Texas. La polizia fa partire le ricerche, ma il filmato della telecamera di sorveglianza rivela una scioccante verità.

programme.title: Delitti a circuito chiuso
programme.desc: Nel giugno 2016, Larry Weaver decide di trascorrere la notte a Sikeston mentre torna a casa da sua moglie. Non c'è traccia di lui o della sua bicicletta il giorno successivo, ma le telecamere di sicurezza potrebbero aiutare la polizia.

programme.title: Stalker: Attrazione fatale
programme.desc: Nel 1991, Jane dice no alle avances di Jim, uno studente come lei. Questi, incapace di accettare il rifiuto, realizza un video della compagna di studi a sua insaputa. I guai non sono ancora finiti: un estraneo si intrufola nella casa della ragazza.

programme.title: Mogli assassine
programme.desc: Jameelah, studentessa di Baltimora, si innamora di James, spacciatore di droga. Neanche la prigione li separa e i due si sposano. Ma la situazione diventa difficile e in un momento di rabbia lei lo accoltella.

programme.title: Mogli assassine
programme.desc: Jonathan e Courtney, una coppia di sordi, si innamorano, ma la luna di miele finisce quando lei lo lascia e lui incontra un'altra donna. Quando la ragazza lo scopre, si scatena una lotta mortale.

programme.desc: Il corpo di Jessica viene ritrovato senza vita nella sua auto, parcheggiata vicino a un supermercato. Per risolvere il caso, gli investigatori sperano nell'aiuto dei filmati delle telecamere di sorveglianza.

programme.title: Delitti a circuito chiuso

programme.title: Delitti a circuito chiuso

programme.title: Delitti a circuito chiuso

programme.title: Matlock: The Trial (Part 1)

programme.title: Matlock: The Trial (Part 2)
programme.desc: Matlock’s investigation as the state’s Special Prosecutor uncovers a judicial conspiracy involving two judges and a corporate lawyer.

programme.title: Matlock: The Accident
programme.desc: Matlock’s client is accused of killing his ambulance-chasing lawyer who specializes in cases of personal injury – especially when the injuries occur at a local amusement park.

programme.title: Matlock: The Celebrity
programme.desc: Ben Matlock flies out to Hollywood to defend a beautiful former actress, Catherine Welden, who formed a lucrative cosmetic business only to be accused of murdering an ex-lover who was blackmailing her.

programme.title: Matlock: The Witness Killings (Part 1)
programme.desc: When Matlock returns to his hometown, he ends up defending an accused murderer and becoming the town’s worst enemy.

programme.title: Matlock: The Witness Killings (Part 2)
programme.desc: When Matlock returns to his hometown, he ends up defending an accused murderer and becoming the town’s worst enemy.

programme.title: Matlock: The Strangler

programme.title: Matlock: The Nightmare
programme.desc: A vacation to a wild west ghost town becomes more than Matlock bargained for as a bump on the head takes him straight back in time to the real old wild west, surrounded by familiar faces – with very unfamiliar occupations.

programme.title: Matlock: The Marriage Counselor
programme.desc: Matlock’s dull, droning insurance broker, Allan Corning finds therapy for his struggling marriage interrupted by the sudden murder of his therapist, Dr. Harding Fletcher.

programme.title: Matlock: The Dame
programme.desc: When Matlock is slapped by an attractive older woman in a restaurant, Ben recalls to Julie the story of his first case – the murder of the man who put him through law school.

programme.title: Matlock: The Secret (Part 2)

programme.desc: D.A. Julie March refuses to back away from a closed case in which her prime murder suspect commits suicide and, after his death, allegedly disposes of a missing murder weapon.

programme.title: Matlock: The Mayor (Part 1)

programme.title: Matlock: The Mayor (Part 2)
programme.desc: Matlock’s trip to the Windy City to defend a 1960’s radical accused of murdering Chicago’s mayor comes to a head in the second part of this dramatic two-part episode.

programme.title: Matlock: The Black Widow
programme.desc: Matlock takes the case of Ken Wilson, convicted of murdering his wife, whose body was never found. Recently released from prison after seven years, Wilson sets out to find his missing wife but gets arrested again.

programme.title: Matlock: The Other Woman
programme.desc: A disappearing diary, a missing mistress and a preposterous police report pose problems for Matlock when he agrees to defend a psychiatrist, Lucas Forbes.

programme.title: Matlock: The Psychic
programme.desc: Matlock defends a prominent psychic, Jennifer Holtz, who foresees her boyfriend’s murder and is subsequently arrested when he is found dead and Jennifer has no alibi.

programme.title: Matlock: The Thief (Part 1)
programme.desc: A rare-coin dealer invests his trust in Matlock when he’s accused of murdering an employee who was caught stealing valuable coins. Meanwhile, Tyler becomes disgruntled when Matlock hires another private investigator, Linda Hansfield, to work on the case.

programme.title: Matlock: The Thief (Part 2)
programme.desc: While defending a coin dealer accused of murdering an employee, Matlock and Tyler suspect the new investigator Ben hired, Linda Hansfield, is being blackmailed by the real kIller.

programme.title: Matlock: The Thoroughbred
programme.desc: A picturesque thoroughbred horse farm provides an unusual setting for murder when Ben Matlock defends a slow-witted stable hand, Tommy Jenks, accused of killing the stable owner’s daughter.

programme.title: Matlock: The Model
programme.desc: Ben Matlock defends a renowned journalist accused of murdering a beautiful international model. Matlock’s investigation is stalled when he is struck by a car and lands in the hospital with a slight case of amnesia.

programme.title: Matlock: The Cult
programme.desc: Matlock believes in the innocence of a man whose brainwashed son insists he saw his father kill the leader of his cult. Ben is the only hope left for a concerned father whose son, David, has been swept into a religious cult.

programme.title: Matlock: The Priest
programme.desc: A lawyer friend of Matlock’s puts his faith in the crafty attorney when his client is accused of killing a feisty priest, Father Fitzgerald.

programme.title: Matlock: The Witness
programme.desc: Ben Matlock gives his assistant, Michelle Thomas, her toughest courtroom assignment... breaking down the eyewitness testimony of a former law classmate in a brutal murder case.

programme.title: Matlock: The Best Seller
programme.desc: District Attorney Julie March matches wits with tempestuous author Cynthia Slayton, whose torrid novels are suddenly eclipsed by facts surrounding the death of her best friend.

programme.title: Matlock: The Good Boy
programme.desc: When Tony Morgan, a smooth-talking, seemingly perfect son, frames his mother for murder, no one even suspects his involvement. No one except Ben Matlock, who tries to prove the good boy isn’t so good after all.

programme.title: Matlock: The Good Boy
programme.desc: When Tony Morgan, a smooth-talking, seemingly perfect son, frames his mother for murder, no one even suspects his involvement. No one except Ben Matlock, who tries to prove the good boy isn’t so good after all.

programme.title: Matlock: The Ex
programme.desc: Ben Matlock finds himself in an awkward situation when he joins Julie March in Baltimore to help her defend an old friend accused of murder.

programme.title: Matlock: The Ex
programme.desc: Ben Matlock finds himself in an awkward situation when he joins Julie March in Baltimore to help her defend an old friend accused of murder.

programme.title: Matlock: The Clown
programme.desc: Matlock holds the last ray of hope for a veteran circus clown, Homer Fleming, accused of murdering his partner during a performance.

programme.title: Matlock: The Clown
programme.desc: Matlock holds the last ray of hope for a veteran circus clown, Homer Fleming, accused of murdering his partner during a performance.

programme.title: Matlock: The Star
programme.desc: Ben Matlock uncovers plots within a plot when Noel Bishop, the wunderkind director of horror films, is accused of murdering motion picture star Catherine McKay as the cameras roll.

programme.title: Matlock: The Star
programme.desc: Ben Matlock uncovers plots within a plot when Noel Bishop, the wunderkind director of horror films, is accused of murdering motion picture star Catherine McKay as the cameras roll.

programme.title: Matlock: The Con Man
programme.desc: Ben Matlock has serious doubts about a code of ethics among con artists which is never supposed to include murder.

programme.title: Matlock: The Con Man
programme.desc: Ben Matlock has serious doubts about a code of ethics among con artists which is never supposed to include murder.

programme.title: Matlock: The Prisoner (Part 1)
programme.desc: Ben Matlock accepts the most dangerous case of his career when he agrees to defend an inmate accused of murder – before a kangaroo court in a riot-torn prison.

programme.title: Matlock: The Prisoner (Part 1)
programme.desc: Ben Matlock accepts the most dangerous case of his career when he agrees to defend an inmate accused of murder – before a kangaroo court in a riot-torn prison.

programme.title: Matlock: The Prisoner (Part 2)
programme.desc: Matlock must protect his own life while he’s in prison trying to defend his client. Meanwhile, Conrad tries to unravel the prison murder plot from outside the walls.

programme.title: Matlock: The Prisoner (Part 2)
programme.desc: Matlock must protect his own life while he’s in prison trying to defend his client. Meanwhile, Conrad tries to unravel the prison murder plot from outside the walls.

programme.title: Matlock: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Ben Matlock is left with a lot of questions and no answers when his client, Drew Carey, bolts from the courtroom during a preliminary hearing for murder.

programme.title: Matlock: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Ben Matlock is left with a lot of questions and no answers when his client, Drew Carey, bolts from the courtroom during a preliminary hearing for murder.

programme.title: Matlock: The Buddies
programme.desc: A deathbed letter from an old friend puts the life of Ben Matlock in peril when he feels morally obligated to reopen a murder case more than three decades old.

programme.title: Matlock: The Buddies
programme.desc: A deathbed letter from an old friend puts the life of Ben Matlock in peril when he feels morally obligated to reopen a murder case more than three decades old.

programme.title: Matlock: The Scrooge
programme.desc: The senseless murder of a toy store owner not only clouds the Christmas spirit, but threatens an annual party and gifts of toys to local orphans.

programme.title: Matlock: The Scrooge
programme.desc: The senseless murder of a toy store owner not only clouds the Christmas spirit, but threatens an annual party and gifts of toys to local orphans.

programme.title: Matlock: The Student
programme.desc: A philandering college professor is murdered in his classroom and Marcy Hansen is the prime suspect, having announced her pregnancy in an argument before witnesses.

programme.title: Matlock: The Student
programme.desc: A philandering college professor is murdered in his classroom and Marcy Hansen is the prime suspect, having announced her pregnancy in an argument before witnesses.

programme.title: Matlock: The Talk Show
programme.desc: Ben Matlock and Michelle Thomas are exposed to a quick course in trash television when a vicious talk show host, Don Galloway, humiliates three prominent women to boost his ratings.

programme.title: Matlock: The Talk Show
programme.desc: Ben Matlock and Michelle Thomas are exposed to a quick course in trash television when a vicious talk show host, Don Galloway, humiliates three prominent women to boost his ratings.

programme.title: Matlock: The Victim
programme.desc: Ben Matlock is convinced that Alex Gordon, a paraplegic, murdered his wife and framed his business partner, Bret Howell, for the crime.

programme.title: Matlock: The Victim
programme.desc: Ben Matlock is convinced that Alex Gordon, a paraplegic, murdered his wife and framed his business partner, Bret Howell, for the crime.

programme.title: Keiner Verlässt Das Schiff
programme.desc: Ein frisch verheirateter Mann muss in D.C. erklären, was aus einem Navy-Zerstörer wurde, der seit dem Zweiten Weltkrieg vermisst wird.

programme.title: Always Woodstock
programme.desc: Mut zum Neustart beweist Catherine (Alison Miller) in ALWAYS WOODSTOCK, sie nimmt die eigene Musiker-Karriere in die Hand, verlässt ihren untreuen Verlobten und kehrt New York den Rücken...

programme.title: Besuch von einem kleinen Planeten
programme.desc: Weil die Menschen ihn neugierig machen, parkt Lewis sein Raumschiff im Garten eines Skeptikers, und beide erhalten Einblick in eine Welt, die sie nie vergessen werden! Basierend auf dem Theaterstück von Gore Vidal.

programme.title: Hausarrest
programme.desc: Nach Ankündigung ihrer Scheidung findet sich ein Pärchen aus der Vorstadt zusammen in ihrem eigenen Keller eingeschlossen, um auf Geheiß ihrer Kinder ihre Differenzen beizulegen.

programme.title: Keiner Verlässt Das Schiff
programme.desc: Ein frisch verheirateter Mann muss in D.C. erklären, was aus einem Navy-Zerstörer wurde, der seit dem Zweiten Weltkrieg vermisst wird.

programme.title: Die Haarsträubende Reise In Einem Verrückten Bus
programme.sub-title: Die Haarsträubende Reise In Einem Verrückten Bus
programme.desc: Die wunderbare Parodie auf Katastrophenfilme handelt vom ersten nuklear angetriebenen Bus der Welt - ein 75-Tonnen-Monster auf 32 gigantischen Rädern - und seiner Jungfernfahrt von New York nach Denver.

programme.title: Wilde Kirschen - The Power of the Pussy
programme.sub-title: Wilde Kirschen - The Power of the Pussy
programme.desc: An der High School schließen drei hübsche Freundinnen einen Pakt: Sie wollen auf keinen Fall in irgendwelchen ''Wen habe ich schon gekriegt''-Listen der Jungs landen und mit dem Sex warten, bis sie der Meinung sind, dass die richtige Zeit gekommen ist...

programme.title: Der Agentenschreck
programme.desc: Ein trotteliger junger Mann erhält in seinen Albträumen hochgeheime Informationen, die ein Freund als Grundlage für einen Comic verwendet. Das weckt bald das Interesse des CIA und ausländischer Geheimdienste.

programme.title: Funny Money
programme.desc: Als Henry Perkins versehentlich seinen Aktenkoffer mit einem Mann tauscht, findet er fünf Millionen Dollar darin. Doch das Geld zieht Mr. Big an, der sein Geld zurückhaben möchte.

programme.title: Funny Money
programme.desc: Als Henry Perkins versehentlich seinen Aktenkoffer mit einem Mann tauscht, findet er fünf Millionen Dollar darin. Doch das Geld zieht Mr. Big an, der sein Geld zurückhaben möchte.

programme.title: Margot und die Hochzeit
programme.desc: Am Vorabend der Hochzeit ihrer ihr fremd gewordenen Schwester Pauline mit dem arbeitslosen Malcolm im Haus ihrer Familie am Meer taucht Margot auf, um die Bande zwischen den Schwestern neu zu knüpfen.

programme.title: Margot und die Hochzeit
programme.desc: Am Vorabend der Hochzeit ihrer ihr fremd gewordenen Schwester Pauline mit dem arbeitslosen Malcolm im Haus ihrer Familie am Meer taucht Margot auf, um die Bande zwischen den Schwestern neu zu knüpfen.

programme.title: Die Brady Family
programme.desc: Mike und Carol müssen in einer Woche $20,000 auftreiben oder sie verlieren ihr Haus an einen Nachbarn. Aber noch schlimmer ist, Marcia holt sich eine dicke Nase bei einem Date, Cindy ist tratschsüchtig and Jan hörte eine psychotische innere Stimme.

programme.title: Dick (1999)

programme.title: Smart People
programme.desc: Ein brillanter Professor mit wenig Sozialkompetenz entdeckt, dass Liebe und Familie kniffliger sind als jede akademische Herausforderung.
